positive: A symmetrical and highly detailed celestial forest tapestry. The main scene features glowing, stylized bioluminescent flora (ferns, fungi) interconnected by swirling cosmic pathways. In the foreground, crystalline river details flow around perfectly placed stylized silhouettes of gentle woodland creatures (deer, fox). The color palette is deep space violet, electric teal, emerald green, accented by gold dust luminosity. Composition must be central, utilizing negative space for maximum impact, optimized for a clean apparel print. Art Nouveau style meets modern psychedelic illustration. High contrast, clean lines, vector graphic quality, suitable for screen printing.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, blurry, messy, jpeg artifacts, grainy, low detail, malformed, mutated, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, poor contrast, oversaturated, grayscale
